phases.label: ONNX Runtime
phases.description: Run ML models from PyTorch/TensorFlow in C++ for production.

topics.label: Setup & Model Loading
topics.description: Install ONNX Runtime C++ API and load .onnx model files. Cross-platform inference.

topics.label: Session & Inference
topics.description: Create InferenceSession, prepare input tensors, and run inference.

topics.label: Input/Output Tensors
topics.description: Create Ort::Value tensors from raw data. Handle dynamic shapes and batching.

topics.label: Execution Providers
topics.description: CPU, CUDA, TensorRT, DirectML, CoreML. Choose the right backend for your hardware.

topics.label: Model Optimization
topics.description: Graph optimizations, quantization, and session options for performance.
